overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a narrow neon-lit cyberpunk alley at night. The player approaches and walks through a small food stall before continuing into a wider street with steam vents and industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk commercial alley with neon signage and street vendors

events.description: elderly pedestrian in brown coat temporarily blocks left side of frame while walking with cane
approaching the entrance of the covered food stall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the narrow wet alley toward a food vendor stall

notable_agents.action: elderly pedestrian in brown coat walking slowly with a cane along the left wall
pedestrian in white jacket and jeans crossing the path from right to left

entered.detail: tall building facade with glowing cyan neon signage and industrial details
small food vendor stall with black and white striped awning and metal counter
dense network of rusted pipes and ventilation ducts crossing between buildings overhead
illuminated blue vending machine with glowing interface against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow cyberpunk alley at night, lined with industrial buildings featuring cyan neon signage. The camera moves forward through the wet asphalt street, passing an elderly pedestrian with a cane and another pedestrian crossing the path. Overhead, a dense network of pipes crosses between the buildings as the camera approaches a small food stall with a striped awning in the center of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed food vendor stall interior with kitchen equipment and fluorescent lighting

events.description: entering the covered food stall structure with striped fabric walls
navigating through the narrow confined space between kitchen shelves and service counter

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow interior of the food stall, passing the vendor counter and kitchen area

notable_agents.action: vendor in green shirt working behind the food preparation counter

entered.detail: metal service counter with food preparation items, white hat, and condiments
bright overhead fluorescent lighting strips illuminating the stall interior
metal shelving units with cooking supplies, boxes, and kitchen equipment
black and white striped fabric walls enclosing the stall structure

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the enclosed food stall, transitioning from neon-lit alley to artificially lit interior. Inside, fluorescent tubes illuminate a narrow space with a metal service counter on the right where a vendor in a green shirt works, and kitchen shelves on the left. The camera moves through the confined space between the striped fabric walls, passing a white hat on the counter, before approaching the exit on the far side.

scene_state.functional_zone: wider cyberpunk street with industrial steam vents and curved architecture

events.description: exiting the food stall back into the open street with wider spatial layout
passing ground steam vents emitting white vapor across the wet pavement

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past the stall, navigating around steam vents into a wider area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow plaid shirt walking past the camera on the left side

entered.detail: ground vents emitting white steam and vapor across the wet asphalt surface
large cylindrical industrial structure with steam pipes and metal walkways
tall red illuminated banner with white text and symbols
large illuminated advertisement screen glowing at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the food stall, the scene opens into a wider cyberpunk street with steam vents emitting vapor across the wet ground. A large curved industrial building dominates the right side with a prominent red banner, while neon signage continues to illuminate the area. The camera moves forward past a pedestrian in a yellow plaid shirt, heading toward a distant glowing billboard at the street's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, neon-lit alley that transitions through a cramped food stall into a wider industrial street. It begins by gliding along wet asphalt beneath a network of overhead pipes and cyan signage, passing pedestrians as it approaches a small stall with a striped awning. As the camera enters the stall, the environment shifts from the open alley to a confined, artificially lit interior where fluorescent tubes illuminate a metal service counter and a vendor in a green shirt. The scene then opens back up upon exiting the stall, expanding into a broader street filled with steam vents emitting vapor across the ground. Finally, the camera moves past a pedestrian in a yellow plaid shirt and a large curved building with a red banner, heading toward a glowing billboard in the distance.
